caption: The video captures a formal event, likely a conference or seminar, taking place in a well-lit auditorium with wooden blinds covering the windows. A speaker stands at a podium on the left side of the stage, while another individual, possibly an interpreter or co-presenter, is positioned to the right, using sign language. The audience, seated in rows of chairs, appears attentive and engaged, with some individuals taking notes. The setting suggests a professional or educational context, with the "ORCA" logo visible in the corner, indicating the organization or theme of the event. The atmosphere is one of focused discussion and learning.
